'''''Striker''''' was a group of three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]]. They were the first group of a three-wave corvette [[Attack on the Red Wind|attack]] on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Red Wind]]''.

However, they were all destroyed by the ''Red Wind''{{'s}} turbolasers.<ref name="X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide">''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
